signpost.no_more_waystones: You don't have permission to place more waystones.

signpost.no_permission_to_edit_waystone: You do not have permission to edit this waystone.

signpost.no_waystones: You didn't discover any waystones yet.
signpost.too_expensive: You don't have the requirement items (%d %s).
signpost.too_far_away: You cannot travel this far (distance: %s, maximum: %s)
signpost.unlimited_signposts: The amount of signposts you are allowed to place is not limited.
signpost.unlimited_signposts_other: The amount of signposts %s is allowed to place is not limited.
signpost.unlimited_waystones: The amount of waystones you are allowed to place is not limited.
signpost.unlimited_waystones_other: The amount of waystones %s is allowed to place is not limited.
text.autoconfig.signpost.option.client.e: Defines whether the confirmation screen pops when using a sign to teleport.
CAUTION 1: The necessary items will be removed without notice if costs are involved.
CAUTION 2: The only way to edit a sign with destination is through this screen.
This should probably never be turned off. Why did I make it an option? No idea.
text.autoconfig.signpost.option.common.w: Decide what waystone models are generated in villages
You can look up the model names at https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/signpost/pages/waystone-models
Disables generator blocks/signs being replaced with actual ones and makes them visible.
Only enable this if you want to design structures with auto generated waystones / sign posts.
Enables the generation of signposts and waystones in villages
The maximum number of signposts that can spawn in one village. Will be ignored for 'Repurposed Structures' villages, use data packs for that
The names of waystones generated in villages will consist of a prefix, an infix and a postfix, each randomly selected from these lists.
e.g.: If "tol ", "ker" and "dra" are selected, the name will be "Tol Kerdra"
Defines whether village signposts can have any waystones as destination or just the ones generated in other villages
text.autoconfig.signpost.option.server.a: You can define which waystone models are enabled.
Disabled types are still in the game but disappear from the creative menu. Use data packs to remove the stonecutter recipes as well.
Check out the curseforge page to see what they look like: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/signpost/pages/waystone-models
text.autoconfig.signpost.option.server.p: Defines who (except the owner) can move a waystone by ctrl-picking it / destroying it with silk touch
text.autoconfig.signpost.option.server.t: If "Item" is a valid item, players will have to pay an amount of
constant_payment + distance / distance_per_payment of this item when using a sign post to teleport.
A negative distance_per_payment will set the second part of the sum to 0.
text.autoconfig.signpost.title: Signpost
